regional_cost_note: Locksmiths in Gisborne typically charge $130–$270 for a standard lockout callout, $160–$480 for a new lock supply and fit, and $650–$2,800+ for a master key system. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. After-hours callout fees are common — confirm rates before booking an emergency job.
